# Ride The Tide

> Free peptide research and protocol tracking platform: dosage calculators, reconstitution guides, stack compatibility, bloodwork decoding, and a 50+ peptide research library. For research and educational use only — peptides referenced are not FDA approved for human consumption.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Peptide protocol tracker with dose logging, cycle management, and stack builder.
- [Free Course](/free-course): Educational course on peptide research fundamentals.
- [Live Q&A](/live-qna): Monthly live peptide research Q&A sessions.
- [COA Verification](/coa-verification): Certificate of Analysis verification for peptide vendors.
- [Bloodwork](/bloodwork): AI-powered lab report analysis with biomarker decoding.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the platform.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Research-only safety disclaimer.

## Peptide research library

- [BPC-157](/peptides/bpc-157): Healing and gut-repair peptide profile.
- [TB-500](/peptides/tb-500): Tissue repair and recovery peptide.
- [Retatrutide](/peptides/retatrutide): GLP-1/GIP/glucagon triple agonist for weight loss.
- [Tirzepatide](/peptides/tirzepatide): GLP-1/GIP dual agonist.
- [Semaglutide](/peptides/semaglutide): GLP-1 receptor agonist.
- [Ipamorelin](/peptides/ipamorelin): Selective GH secretagogue.
- [CJC-1295](/peptides/cjc-1295): GHRH analog for growth hormone release.
- [GHK-Cu](/peptides/ghk-cu): Copper peptide for skin and tissue repair.
- [Epitalon](/peptides/epitalon): Telomerase activator and longevity peptide.
- [SS-31](/peptides/ss-31): Mitochondrial-targeted peptide.

## Categories

- [Healing peptides](/categories/healing): BPC-157, TB-500, and recovery research.
- [Weight loss peptides](/categories/weight-loss): GLP-1 agonists and metabolic peptides.
- [Longevity peptides](/categories/longevity): Telomerase and senescence research.
- [Cognitive peptides](/categories/cognitive): Semax, Selank, and nootropic research.
- [Growth hormone peptides](/categories/growth-hormone): Ipamorelin, CJC-1295 protocols.
- [Immune peptides](/categories/immune): Thymosin Alpha-1, Thymalin research.

## Guides

- [Reconstitution guide](/guides/reconstitution): Step-by-step peptide reconstitution.
- [Injection guide](/guides/injection): Subcutaneous injection technique.
- [Bloodwork guide](/guides/bloodwork): Biomarker tracking for peptide research.
